mapper.sql: basic_salary, attendance_deduction, leave_deduction, overtime_pay, gross_pay, social_insurance_personal, housing_fund_personal, taxable_income, tax, other_deduction, net_pay
id, employee_id, year, month, batch_id, , probation_ratio, leave_days, overtime_hours, late_count, early_count, absent_count, warnings, blockings, status, encryption_version, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO salary_record ( employee_id, year, month, batch_id, basic_salary, attendance_deduction, leave_deduction, overtime_pay, gross_pay, social_insurance_personal, housing_fund_personal, taxable_income, tax, other_deduction, net_pay, probation_ratio, leave_days, overtime_hours, late_count, early_count, absent_count, warnings, blockings, status, encryption_version, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{year}, #{month}, #{batchId}, #{basicSalary, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{attendanceDeduction, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{leaveDeduction, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{overtimePay, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{grossPay, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{socialInsurancePersonal, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{housingFundPersonal, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{taxableIncome, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{tax, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{otherDeduction, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{netPay, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{probationRatio}, #{leaveDays}, #{overtimeHours}, #{lateCount}, #{earlyCount}, #{absentCount}, #{warnings}, #{blockings}, #{status}, 1, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO salary_record ( employee_id, year, month, batch_id, basic_salary, attendance_deduction, leave_deduction, overtime_pay, gross_pay, social_insurance_personal, housing_fund_personal, taxable_income, tax, other_deduction, net_pay, probation_ratio, leave_days, overtime_hours, late_count, early_count, absent_count, warnings, blockings, status, encryption_version, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.employeeId}, #{item.year}, #{item.month}, #{item.batchId}, #{item.basicSalary, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{item.attendanceDeduction, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{item.leaveDeduction, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{item.overtimePay, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{item.grossPay, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{item.socialInsurancePersonal, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{item.housingFundPersonal, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{item.taxableIncome, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{item.tax, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{item.otherDeduction, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{item.netPay, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{item.probationRatio}, #{item.leaveDays}, #{item.overtimeHours}, #{item.lateCount}, #{item.earlyCount}, #{item.absentCount}, #{item.warnings}, #{item.blockings}, #{item.status}, 1, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM salary_record WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND year = #{year} ORDER BY month ASC

SELECT sr.id, sr.employee_id, sr.year, sr.month, , sr.probation_ratio, sr.leave_days, sr.overtime_hours, sr.late_count, sr.early_count, sr.absent_count, sr.warnings, sr.blockings, sr.status, sr.encryption_version, sr.create_time, sr.update_time FROM salary_record sr INNER JOIN employee e ON sr.employee_id = e.id WHERE e.dept_id = #{deptId} AND sr.year = #{year} AND sr.month = #{month}
mapper.update: UPDATE salary_record SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE salary_record SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} AND status = #{fromStatus}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM salary_record WHERE batch_id = #{batchId}
SELECT FROM salary_record WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} ORDER BY employee_id ASC
